title: Camping Dashboard — Architecture & Field Operations Map
description: Single-page field operations dashboard for an Algonquin camping trip with Supabase persistence, authenticated CRUD, environmental refresh jobs, mapping, readiness scoring, and mission/intel overlays.

nodes.label: Next.js App Shell
nodes.description: Single-page Next.js 16 dashboard with App Router, React 19, Tailwind v4.

nodes.label: Google OAuth
nodes.description: Supabase Google OAuth with server-side callback route.

nodes.label: Email Whitelist Auth
nodes.description: Whitelisted emails get full CRUD; others get read-only.

nodes.label: Open-Meteo API
nodes.description: Free weather forecast API for current + 5-day daily data.

nodes.label: Ontario Parks Alerts
nodes.description: Algonquin backcountry alerts page scraped via HTML regex.

nodes.label: Environment Canada
nodes.description: EC weather alerts via ATOM/XML RSS feed.

nodes.label: MapTiler SDK
nodes.description: Vector tile map rendering with custom style.

nodes.label: Mission Brief Video
nodes.description: MP4 hosted on Vercel Blob Storage.

nodes.label: /api/refresh-weather
nodes.description: Fetches Open-Meteo, maps to schema, upserts weather tables.

nodes.label: /api/refresh-alerts
nodes.description: Scrapes Ontario Parks + EC feeds, upserts alerts table.

nodes.label: Vercel Cron Jobs
nodes.description: Daily cron: weather at 11:00 UTC, alerts at 11:15 UTC.

nodes.label: Readiness Engine
nodes.description: Weighted scoring: gear 35%, meals 20%, weather 15%, offline 20%, timeline 10%.

nodes.label: Weather Mapper
nodes.description: Maps Open-Meteo response to Supabase weather schema with WMO codes.

nodes.label: Alert Scrapers
nodes.description: HTML and ATOM/XML parsing for Ontario Parks and EC alerts.

nodes.label: Helper Functions
nodes.description: Countdown, formatting, grouping, astro helpers, theme logic.

nodes.label: Supabase PostgreSQL
nodes.description: Primary data store with browser + admin clients.

nodes.label: 12 Dashboard Tables
nodes.description: trips, weather_current, weather_forecast, gear_items, timeline_events, meals, crew_members, park_intel, offline_status, astro_data, alerts, settings.

nodes.label: Settings Table
nodes.description: Controls card visibility (show_meals, show_crew, show_offline, show_astro) and theme override.

nodes.label: Weather + Forecast Cards
nodes.description: Current conditions and 5-day forecast display.

nodes.label: Alerts Card
nodes.description: Active alerts with severity badges; manual add/delete.

nodes.label: Gear Checklist
nodes.description: Gear items grouped by category with full CRUD and pack toggle.

nodes.label: Meal Planner
nodes.description: Meals grouped by day with full CRUD. Visibility: settings.show_meals.

nodes.label: Timeline / Itinerary
nodes.description: Timeline events grouped by day with full CRUD.

nodes.label: Crew Roster
nodes.description: Crew with canoe assignments and load weights; full CRUD.

nodes.label: Readiness Score
nodes.description: Composite readiness score with component breakdown.

nodes.label: Map / Route Card
nodes.description: MapTiler terrain map with custom styling; dynamically loaded.

nodes.label: Park Intel
nodes.description: Fire restrictions, wildlife, ranger station, firewood, water notes.

nodes.label: Offline Vault
nodes.description: Boolean checklist for offline readiness items with toggle.

nodes.label: Mission Brief Modal
nodes.description: Full-screen video modal triggered from HeroHeader.

nodes.label: Project Intel Modal
nodes.description: Scrollable tech stack summary modal triggered from OfflineVaultCard.

nodes.label: Day/Night Auto-Theme
nodes.description: getThemeModeFromTime() exists but theme is hardcoded to night.

nodes.label: Map Route + Markers
nodes.description: Trip lat/lng available but no polyline or markers rendered.

nodes.label: Settings UI
nodes.description: Settings read from Supabase but no edit UI exists.

nodes.label: Python Scrapers
nodes.description: Standalone Python scrapers superseded by Next.js API routes.

nodes.label: Modal Scheduled Jobs
nodes.description: Background job runner referenced in docs as planned.

nodes.label: Moonrise/Moonset Data
nodes.description: Not available from Open-Meteo; field exists, defaulted to --:--.

nodes.label: Alerts Phase 3
nodes.description: Enhanced Algonquin alerts feed referenced in gemini.md.

edges.label: HTTP fetch
edges.description: API route fetches forecast from Open-Meteo.

edges.label: Raw response
edges.description: Raw Open-Meteo JSON mapped to Supabase schema.

edges.label: Upsert
edges.description: Mapped data upserted to weather_current and weather_forecast.

edges.label: Read
edges.description: Dashboard reads weather from Supabase on page load.

edges.label: HTML scrape
edges.description: Scrapes Algonquin backcountry alerts page.

edges.label: ATOM fetch
edges.description: Fetches EC weather alert RSS feed.

edges.label: Parse
edges.description: HTML and XML parsed into alert objects.

edges.label: Upsert
edges.description: Parsed alerts deduplicated and inserted.

edges.label: Read
edges.description: Active alerts displayed with severity badges.

edges.label: Daily 11:00 UTC
edges.description: Vercel cron triggers weather refresh.

edges.label: Daily 11:15 UTC
edges.description: Vercel cron triggers alerts refresh.

edges.label: Session
edges.description: OAuth session checked against email whitelist.

edges.label: CRUD or read-only
edges.description: Authorized users get mutations; others read-only.

edges.label: Read + CRUD

edges.label: Read + CRUD
edges.description: Crew members fetched and mutated via Supabase.

edges.description: Gear packed status feeds readiness calculation.

edges.label: Score input
edges.description: Meal completeness feeds readiness calculation.

edges.description: Offline checklist feeds readiness calculation.

edges.label: Score input
edges.description: Weather conditions feed readiness calculation.

edges.description: Weighted score rendered in readiness card.

edges.label: Vector tiles
edges.description: MapTiler SDK renders terrain map.

edges.description: Vercel Blob video plays in modal.

edges.description: Project Intel button triggers tech stack modal.

flows.title: Auth & Permission Flow
flows.summary: Google OAuth with email whitelist gates CRUD vs read-only access.

flows.title: Weather Refresh Flow
flows.summary: Vercel cron calls API route which fetches Open-Meteo, normalizes, and upserts to Supabase.

flows.title: Alerts Refresh Flow
flows.summary: Vercel cron calls API route which scrapes Ontario Parks and EC, upserts alerts.

flows.title: Supabase CRUD Flow
flows.summary: Authenticated users perform optimistic CRUD against Supabase via centralized mutations.

flows.title: Readiness Scoring Flow
flows.summary: Five domain scores weighted and composited into overall readiness.

flows.title: Gear Checklist Flow
flows.summary: Gear items with pack toggle, category grouping, and full CRUD.

flows.title: Meal Planning Flow
flows.summary: Meals grouped by day with full CRUD; visibility controlled by settings.

flows.title: Timeline / Itinerary Flow
flows.summary: Timeline events grouped by day with full CRUD.

flows.title: Crew / Load Balance Flow
flows.summary: Crew with canoe assignments and load weights; full CRUD.

flows.title: Map Flow
flows.summary: MapTiler terrain map dynamically loaded client-side.

flows.title: Mission Brief Flow
flows.summary: Video modal triggered from HeroHeader; hosted on Vercel Blob.

flows.title: Future Scheduled Jobs
flows.summary: Planned Modal background jobs for automated refresh triggers.

future.label: Modal Scheduled Jobs
future.description: Background job runner for automated weather/alert refresh.

future.label: Moonrise/Moonset Data
future.description: Open-Meteo lacks this data; field defaulted to --:--.

future.label: Settings Management UI
future.description: Settings table is read but has no edit interface.

future.label: Algonquin Alerts Phase 3
future.description: Enhanced alert feed referenced in gemini.md.
